holdings.infoBox: ASCE is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are StoneX Group stock at 3.71%, Carpenter Technology at 3.32%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 3.31%, TTM Technologies at 3.30%, and Blue Bird at 2.77%.

overview.description: The Allspring SMID Core ETF (ASCE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund actively invests in large-cap companies in the US, selected through a combination of fundamental analysis and a proprietary valuation framework. ASCE was launched on Jul 7, 2025 and is issued by Allspring.
